mapper.select: select t.withUserId as withUserId, t.lastMsgId as lastMsgId, m.content as lastContent, m.create_time as lastTime, ifnull(u.unreadCount, 0) as unreadCount from ( select case when from_user_id = #{myId} then to_user_id else from_user_id end as withUserId, max(id) as lastMsgId from tb_private_message where from_user_id = #{myId} or to_user_id = #{myId} group by case when from_user_id = #{myId} then to_user_id else from_user_id end ) t join tb_private_message m on m.id = t.lastMsgId left join ( select from_user_id as withUserId, count(1) as unreadCount from tb_private_message where to_user_id = #{myId} and (status <> #{readStatus}) group by from_user_id ) u on u.withUserId = t.withUserId order by t.lastMsgId desc
